name: ting-lu
flavor_texts: The fear poured into an ancient ritual vessel has clad itself in rocks and dirt to become a Pokémon.
It slowly brings its exceedingly heavy head down upon the ground, splitting the earth open with huge fissures that run over 160 feet deep.
text: Ting-lu is the Ruinous Pokémon. It is a dark and ground-type Pokémon. Abilities: vessel-of-ruin. Base stats — HP: 155, Attack: 110, Defense: 125, Sp. Atk: 55, Sp. Def: 80, Speed: 45. Evolution line: ting-lu. Lore: The fear poured into an ancient ritual vessel has clad itself in rocks and dirt to become a Pokémon. It slowly brings its exceedingly heavy head down upon the ground, splitting the earth open with huge fissures that run over 160 feet deep.
